tool.name: Beacon2 genomicVariations postprocessing
tool.description: add caseLevelData or variantLevelData to existing Beacon genomic variations

configfiles.configfile:
@BEACON2_CONF_BASE_ADVANCED@
# Tool-specific settings for genomicVariations_postprocessing record_type = 'genomicVariation' collection_name = 'genomicVariations'

tool.help:
**Beacon2 genomicVariations Post-processing**
Adds `caseLevelData` or `variantLevelData` to genomic variations that have already been loaded into the Beacon MongoDB.
**New flexible options (Advanced section):** - Reference genome - Case-level data generation - Maximum rows to process (0 = unlimited) - Allele frequency & population settings - Verbose logging - **Custom conf.py** (upload your own optimized config file for full control)
MongoDB credentials are read automatically from your Galaxy user preferences (or fall back to Docker Compose defaults).
